id-59354.title: Guitarist
id-59354.post-content:
The Guitarist template is an energetic music portfolio design ideal for singers, musicians, performers and other creatives. It helps tell your story with a cool black and white effect with bold contrast color.

The template uses a fullscreen hero section to set the scene while unfolding to tell your story as you go down the page. There’s space for skills, experience, awards, resume, services and event dates and tickets. It’s one template that can do everything and we cannot recommend it enough.

Key features of the Guitarist template

  • WordPress portfolio template for performers
  • Bold design with characterful black and white imagery
  • Tells your story as you go down the page
  • SEO friendly and fully responsive
  • Full compatibility with leading page builders

id-59342.title: Library Cafe
id-59342.post-content:
The Cafe Library template uses warm colors and a fullscreen layout to provide a warm welcome to everyone. It’s designed for cafes and bookshops but could be customized to suit similar small businesses.

There’s lots of page space to highlight features and benefits, an attractive menu section, a map and opening hours section and space for reviews. Everything about the template can be customized to suit your brand using the built-in customization tools or your favorite page builder. 

Key features of the Library Cafe template

  • Warm, engaging small business template
  • Well-designed layout with lots of space for features
  • Attractive map, service and menu sections
  • SEO friendly and fully responsive
  • Full compatibility with leading page builders

id-69440.title: Eyewear Store
id-69440.post-content:
The Eyewear online store template is a light and bright full screen template that makes a great first impression. It opens with a fullscreen image, heading and call to action before opening into a full width store page.

The Eyewear Store template has an upmarket feel with quality images, attractive fonts and modern layout. It is SEO-friendly, WooCommerce compatible and works with most page builders, giving you everything you need to build an online store.

Key features of the Eyewear Store template

  • Compelling eCommerce store theme for WordPress
  • Superb colors, fonts and layout
  • Designed to convert
  • Lots of options for showing products
  • Full compatibility with leading page builders
id-69440.post-excerpt: Light and bright eCommerce template designed to sell any product effectively

id-84445.title: Black Friday
id-84445.post-content:
Are you ready to take your Black Friday sales to the next level? Don't miss out on the opportunity to transform your online presence and boost your business. Dive into the magic of our exclusive, fully responsive Black Friday Cyber Monday web template!

With its sleek design and user-friendly interface, this template is crafted to make your online store shine. Say goodbye to slow load times as the template ensures lightning-fast performance, keeping your customers engaged and ready to shop till they drop.

Key Features of Black Friday

  • Sleek design with Black Friday Cyber Monday theme
  • User-friendly and very easy to use
  • Lightning-fast performance thanks to optimized code
  • Fully responsive and SEO friendly
  • Full compatibility with popular page builders
id-84445.post-excerpt: Boost sales on Black Friday with a user-friendly web template!
